rationale: The cited paper is highly topically aligned: it studies how advertising affects firm value under a strategic moderator, while the citing paper analyzes advertising’s association with shareholder value (abnormal returns/risk) with its own contingency (business scope). The citing note explicitly says it extends prior marketing-finance advertising work, making this citation plausibly a substantive theory/comparison anchor rather than a generic mention. The pair is also confirmed by a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmr.13.0285).
